A magazine-fed crossbow that fires repeatedly without manual reloading. In trained hands it becomes a weapon of sustained fire superiority â€” at the cost of the user's movement.

Training

LevelProperties
UntrainedTwo-Handed, Ranged d4 (80/320), Piercing
BasicTwo-Handed, Ranged d6 (80/320), Reload free, Keen, Steady
MasterTwo-Handed, Ranged d6 (80/320), Reload free, Keen, Steady â€” all bonuses apply
Master PerkWhen you take the Attack action, you may make one additional attack as a bonus action. If you do, your speed becomes 0 until the start of your next turn.
